title: Central University of Punjab Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Posts
shortInfo: Central University of Punjab (CUP) Professor / Associate Professor Notification 2026 has been released on 12 May 2026 on the official website of Central University of Punjab. A total of 8 vacancies have been announced through the CUP Professor / Associate Professor Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: Central University of Punjab Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Posts
basic_details.short_information: Central University of Punjab (CUP) Professor / Associate Professor Notification 2026 has been released on 12 May 2026 on the official website of Central University of Punjab. A total of 8 vacancies have been announced through the CUP Professor / Associate Professor Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Professor (Applied Agriculture): Master’s degree and Ph.D. degree in Food Technology / Food Science & Technology / Food Processing Technology / Food Processing Engineering. Associate Professor (Library & Information Science): As per UGC Regulations on Minimum Qualifications for Appointment of Teachers and Other Academic Staff in Universities and Colleges and Measures for the Maintenance of Standards in Higher Education, 2018. Professor (Mass Comm. & Media Studies): As per UGC Regulations on Minimum Qualifications for Appointment of Teachers and Other Academic Staff in Universities and Colleges and Measures for the Maintenance of Standards in Higher Education, 2018. Professor (Performing and Fine Arts): As per UGC Regulations on Minimum Qualifications for Appointment of Teachers and Other Academic Staff in Universities and Colleges and Measures for the Maintenance of Standards in Higher Education, 2018. Professor (Sociology): As per UGC Regulations on Minimum Qualifications for Appointment of Teachers and Other Academic Staff in Universities and Colleges and Measures for the Maintenance of Standards in Higher Education, 2018. Associate Professor (Public Policy & Governance): As per UGC Regulations on Minimum Qualifications for Appointment of Teachers and Other Academic Staff in Universities and Colleges and Measures for the Maintenance of Standards in Higher Education, 2018. Associate Professor (Centre for Partition and Atrocities Studies): As per UGC Regulations on Minimum Qualifications for Appointment of Teachers and Other Academic Staff in Universities and Colleges and Measures for the Maintenance of Standards in Higher Education, 2018. Associate Professor (Sri Guru Tegh Bahadur Centre of Studies in Indic Civilization and Religious Studies): As per UGC Regulations on Minimum Qualifications for Appointment of Teachers and Other Academic Staff in Universities and Colleges and Measures for the Maintenance of Standards in Higher Education, 2018.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Associate Professor (Centre for Partition and Atrocities Studies)
Associate Professor (Sri Guru Tegh Bahadur Centre of Studies in Indic Civilization and Religious Studies)

salary_details.details: Professor: Entry pay of Rs. 144200/- in the Academic Pay level 14 as per 7th CPC. Associate Professor: Entry pay of Rs. 131400/- in the Academic Pay level 13A as per 7th CPC.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Central University of Punjab to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Central University of Punjab recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Professor and Associate Professor posts at the Central University of Punjab is 02 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Professor and Associate Professor posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies for Professor and Associate Professor positions announced by the Central University of Punjab in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Professor (Applied Agriculture) post?
faq.answer: For the Professor (Applied Agriculture) post, candidates must possess a Master’s degree and a Ph.D. degree in Food Technology, Food Science & Technology, Food Processing Technology, or Food Processing Engineering.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the advertised posts is 64 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules, which can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General/OBC category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for candidates belonging to the General and OBC categories is Rs. 750/-. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Professor and Associate Professor positions at the Central University of Punjab will involve a Presentation/Seminar followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Professor and Associate Professor posts?
faq.answer: Professors will receive an entry pay of Rs. 144200/- in Academic Pay level 14, while Associate Professors will get an entry pay of Rs. 131400/- in Academic Pay level 13A, as per the 7th CPC.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any relaxation in the upper age limit?
faq.answer: The official notification mentions a maximum age limit of 64 years. Details regarding age relaxation for reserved categories are usually provided in the detailed advertisement.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: All eligible candidates must apply online for the Central University of Punjab recruitment. The application link and further instructions are available on the official website.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for the Central University of Punjab recruitment can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article. It contains all the detailed information.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the Central University of Punjab recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Professor and Associate Professor posts at the Central University of Punjab is 02 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.
